_comment: Baseline for scripts/deploy-and-smoke.ps1 bundle check (memo docs/PHASE_B_R5_DEPLOY_SCRIPT_MEMO.md, steps 8.5-8.6). mainBundle.sizeBytes is the AUTHORITATIVE reference: the identity (uncompressed, no Accept-Encoding) Content-Length in raw bytes of the deployed /assets/index-<hash>.js -- exactly what curl reports -- so there is no KiB-vs-kB ambiguity. thresholds are deltas the operator reasons about in KiB (1024). referenceChunks are informational (the size check only inspects mainBundle; 8.5 checks modulepreload by NAME against modulepreloadAllowlist). Updated ONLY via -UpdateBaseline (Q3.a) so each change lands as a reviewable commit.
unit: bytes (identity Content-Length); thresholds + deltas in KiB (1024)
source: current deployed build, byte-identical to local `npm run build` (index-DfhXym2z.js, 392947 B; same content hash served by prod). Supersedes the stale R4-review snapshot (356.64), which was a pre-landing-v2 build AND was mis-labelled KiB when the R4 numbers were actually Vite kB=1000 -- see Phase B R5 Commit D message.
